sqlCommand.descr: update TransX set Region = c.Crcy from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Amt5 = ABS(round(Amt2-Amt1,2)), Amt6 = 100 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Amt6 = ABS(round(Amt5*100/Amt1,2)) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 <> 0
update TransX set Zone = c.Crcy from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Amt7 = round(Amt4-Amt3,2), Amt8 = 100 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Amt3 is NULL
update TransX set Amt8 = ABS(round(Amt7*100/Amt3,2)) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(Amt3,0) <> 0
update TransX set Flex8 = Field1 from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on substring(cc,11-len(ID),99) = ID and Yr = Descr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'ChangeDoc'
update TransX set Flex8 = 'Doc not posted' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex8 is NULL and Location = 'V'
update TransX set Flex8 = 'Doc deleted' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex8 is NULL and Location = 'Z'
update TransX set Flex8 = 'Doc not changed by Posted-By' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex8 is NULL and Flex1 <> Flex4
update TransX set Flex8 = 'Change due to FX' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex8 is NULL and Amt6 < 3 and Amt5 < 100 and (Crcy <> 'USD' or Crcy <> Zone) and coalesce(Amt7,0) = 0
update TransX set Flex8 = 'Posted to Local Ledger only' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex8 is NULL and Ledger in ('LS','LG','MA','TL','Z006','Z016')

update TransX set Flex8 = 'Change under $100 and YTD user change under $1,000 - insignificant' from TransX t inner join (select Flex4, Yr, sum(amt5) as Bal from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ((Flex8 is NULL and Amt5 <= 100) or Flex8 like '%and YTD change under%') group by Flex4, Yr) x on t.Flex4 = x.Flex4 and t.Yr = x.Yr where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and t.Flex8 is NULL and t.Amt5 <= 100 and x.Bal <= 1000
update TransX set Flex8 = '   ** user comments required **' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex8 is NULL
